title: contact_set Phase 2 has no transaction: multi-field patch has observable intermediate state
description: A ChatContact/set patch with both blocked and displayName makes two separate UPDATE calls in Phase 2, each bumping ChatContact state independently. A concurrent ChatContact/get between the two bumps sees a partially-applied patch (e.g. displayName changed, blocked not yet). The Phase 1/Phase 2 split correctly handles input-error atomicity but leaves server-write atomicity unaddressed. The fix — wrapping Phase 2 ops in a single DB transaction with one state bump at the end — is shown by update_space_fully in the same diff. Contacts are currently permanent (never deleted), which prevents the worse notFound-mid-patch scenario, but intermediate state is still observable. This deserves the same treatment spaces got.
